site.title: Tʋʋmd sull ning sẽn get tẽn-zẽmsã soog-n-taar yelle
site.tagline: Sẽn nan yɩll tɩ b tõog n paam b sẽn datã
nav.label: Pipi soabã
hero.home.eyebrow: Soog-n-tɩ-gɛtã sẽn tõe n paam-b to-to
hero.projects.eyebrow: Sebr ning sẽn yaa zãma wã sebre
hero.propose.eyebrow: D sẽn tõe n dɩ to-to
hero.accessibility.eyebrow: B sẽn tõe n paam-b to-to
meta.home.description: IATF lebgda bũmb nins sẽn yaa tɩlae sẽn na yɩl tɩ b tõe n paam b sẽn datã n lebg zĩig b sẽn tõe n tall b sɛbã tɩ nebã fãa tõe n yã wã.
meta.projects.description: Bao-y n bãng y sẽn tõe n maan to-to tɩ nebã tõe n paam seb-kãensã sẽn be IATF wã pʋgẽ wã.
meta.propose.description: Kos-y IATF t'a kõ-y seb-vãoog sẽn na n sõng-y tɩ y bãng y sẽn tõe n maan to-to.
meta.governance.description: Bao-y n bãng-y IATF sẽn maand to-to n deegd tʋʋm-teedo, n zãad b sɛba, la b kɩtdẽ tɩ nebã fãa tõe n bãng b sẽn maandã.
meta.join.description: Y sẽn tõe n maan to-to n kẽes y toog IATF pʋgẽ: y tõe n sõngame tɩ b gʋls noy, n lebg-b ne buud-goam a taaba, n mak-b bɩ n ges b tʋʋmdã yelle.
meta.accessibility.description: Wãn to la IATF baood n na n kɩt tɩ b tõog n paam seb-kãngã, la wãn to la b tõe n wilg tɩ bũmb n gɩdgd-a t'a pa tõe n paam-a?
meta.transparency.description: IATF wã sɛb sẽn be ninsabls tẽnsa pʋga: b yãkda b sẽn na n maan bũmb ninga, b na n maana tʋʋm-teedo, la b manegd-b wakat fãa.
actions.emailProjects: Gʋls-y tʋʋm-te-paalsã sẽn kẽed ne ẽntɛrnetã
registry.empty.title: B pa yiis tʋʋm-te-kãsems ye
registry.empty.body: IATF segenda a pipi zãma wã tʋʋm-teedo.
registry.col.maintainer: Sẽn na n sõng-a t'a kell n yɩ sõma
proposal.form.title: Yãk-y n tool-y neda
proposal.form.body: Y sã n dat n taas IATF kosgo, bɩ y gʋls seb-kãngã sẽn be tẽngrã.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript yaa tɩlae sẽn na yɩl n tũnug ne ẽntɛrnetã seb-kãngã. Y sã n pa tar-a, bɩ y tũnug ne e-mail bɩ Discord a zĩigẽ.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Zĩ-kãnga pʋgẽ, y pa tõe n tʋm-y wakat fãa ye. Fõn-kãng na n paka y e-poosã tʋm-tʋmd ye.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: D segl b sẽn na n tall-a n kẽng zĩig ningã.
proposal.form.ready: Y sã n tʋm kosgã, IATF na n maana sebr sẽn wilgd b sẽn deeg-a wã.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Pʋʋs-y tɩ y reng n ges y sẽn tõe n maan to-to n kogl y mens ne seb-yoodã n yaool n tʋm-a.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Yãk-y n ges-y-yã-a n yaool n tʋm-a.
proposal.form.turnstileError: B pa tõe n vɛrse spãm koglg masã ye. Pʋʋs-y n le mak-y ye.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Spam koglg loogr wakat taame. Pʋʋs-y n le mak n ges-y.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Pʋʋs-y tɩ y pids zĩis nins b sẽn baood tɩ b gʋlsã n yaool n tʋm-yã.
proposal.form.success: D pʋʋs-y-la barka, d reega y kosgã, la d tall-a lame n na n ges-a.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Y sã n leb n wa sõsd ne IATF n dat tɩ b kõ-y seb-kãngã, bɩ y gʋls seb-bil ning sẽn be tẽngrã.
proposal.form.successRecordLabel: Kibar sẽn wilgd tɩ b rɩka bõn-buudã
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Yel-wẽnd n zĩnd y sẽn wa n tʋmda kosgã. Pʋʋs-y n le mak-y. Y zu-loɛɛgã sã n ket n beeme, bɩ y tũnug ne e-mail ye.
proposal.field.optional: Y sẽn tõe n yãk yam to-to
project.detail.eyebrow: Tʋʋmd sẽn kẽed ne zãma wã
project.detail.problemTitle: Yaa zu-loe-bʋg la tʋʋm-kãngã na n welg-yã?
project.detail.whyTitle: Bõe yĩng tɩ b maan tʋʋm-kãngã?
project.detail.scopeInTitle: D sẽn tõe n maan to-to
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: B sẽn pa tõe n maan-a wã
project.detail.field.maintainer: Sẽn na n sõng-a t'a kell n yɩ sõma
project.detail.field.lastUpdated: Sẽn nan yɩll tɩ b leoke
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Yaa ne ãngilind buud-goam bala, la b tõe n wa lebg-a lame n paase
footer.label: Sebrã tẽngre
footer.howToContribute: Y sẽn tõe n maan to-to
footer.accessibility: B sẽn tõe n paam-b to-to
footer.licenseContent: Sẽn be a pʋgẽ CC BY-SA 4.0
footer.blurb: Tʋʋmd sẽn kẽed ne b sẽn tõe n paamã segd n yɩɩ nana n sɩng-a, n yɩ nana n yiis-a la a yɩ nana tɩ b kell n pak-a.
footer.source: Sẽn kẽed ne soog-n-mengã noy: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Yaa neb nins sẽn tũnugd ne sõngr teknolozi wã n wilgd b sẽn segd n maan to-to.
contact.label: Yãk-y n tool-y neda
project.status.proposal: B sẽn na n maan to-to
project.status.seeking-maintainer: B baooda ned sẽn na n ges b yell sõma
translation.label: B sẽn lebg Biiblã to-to
translation.source: Bãngr-gomdã yaa seb-kãngã buud-gomd sẽn yaa sõma n yɩɩd fãa.
translation.humanReviewed: Yaa gom-bi-bɛd sẽn gomd sõma n vaees Traduction du monde nouveau wã.
translation.machineAssisted: Biibl-kãnga lebgame ne masĩn sõngre, la ned sẽn gomd-a sõma nan pa lebg-a zãng ye.
translation.needsUpdate: B sẽn lebg seb-kãngã to-to wã yɩɩ sẽn deng b sẽn na n lebg-a ne ãngilindã n paase, la tõe tɩ yaa tɩlae tɩ b lebs n maneg-a.
translation.report: Rɩk n togs-y mo-yõsr sẽn kẽed ne lebgre: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Yaa woto la a maan-yã .
